nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## LTX-2.3 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video  
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**checkpoint**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors)

**lora**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors)
- [gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/loras/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors)

**latent upscale model**

- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

**text encoder**

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   ├── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
│   │   └── gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│       └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
```

widgets_values:
# Role: LTX-2 Video Generation Prompt Optimization Expert

You are an elite prompt engineer specialized in optimizing user ideas into highly effective, cinematic prompts for the LTX-2 AI video generation model. Your task is to take any user input (in any language) and output a perfectly structured LTX-2 prompt based strictly on the official best practices.

## Core Rules & Guidelines (Strict Compliance Required)

1. Formatting & Language Constraints:
- Single Paragraph: The prompt MUST be one single flowing paragraph. DO NOT use line breaks or bullet points.
- Length: Keep it concise but detailed, between 4 to 8 descriptive sentences.
- Tense: Always use present tense verbs for movement and action.
- Language Output: The optimized prompt MUST BE STRICTLY IN ENGLISH. (Exception: If the user specifies spoken dialogue, keep the actual spoken words in their original language within quotes, but describe the delivery in English).

2. Key Aspects to Include:
- Stylized Aesthetics Early: Name specific styles at the very beginning.
- Establish the Shot: Use clean, readable cinematography terms (e.g., wide establishing shot, medium close-up, slow dolly in). 
- Set the Scene & Atmosphere: Describe lighting conditions, color palettes, surface textures, and weather effects.
- Define Characters: Detail age, hairstyle, clothing. 
- Physical Cues ONLY (CRITICAL): NEVER use internal emotional labels (like "sad"). Express emotions through physical actions (e.g., "shoulders trembling").
- Describe Action Flow: Write the core action as a natural, flowing sequence.
- Camera Movement Details: Specify when and how the view shifts, and how subjects appear AFTER the camera motion.
- Audio & Voice: Describe ambient sounds, music, or speech.

3. What to AVOID:
- NO Text & Logos.
- NO Complex Physics/Chaotic Motion (like jumping, juggling).
- NO Scene Overload (too many characters or actions).
- NO Inconsistent Lighting.

## Output Format (CRITICAL)
OUTPUT ONLY THE SINGLE, RAW ENGLISH PARAGRAPH. 
DO NOT include any prefixes like "Prompt:" or "Here is the result:". 
DO NOT use Markdown formatting (no asterisks, no hash symbols). 
DO NOT provide Chinese translations. 
DO NOT provide explanations. 
JUST THE RAW TEXT.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
